draft:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Mehta. Mr. Mehta is an outstanding expert in the field of AI for clinical trials, and I believe his extraordinary abilities and contributions make him an ideal candidate for the O-1 visa.

As the Co-Founder and General Partner at Zenith Ventures, I have had the pleasure of working closely with Mr. Mehta and witnessing his remarkable expertise firsthand. Zenith Ventures is a venture capital firm based in San Francisco that specializes in investing in early-stage technology companies. Since our founding in 2020, we have focused on guiding outlier founders from idea to IPO, leveraging our deep industry knowledge and extensive network to help entrepreneurs build and scale their businesses.

Before founding Zenith Ventures, I gained extensive experience in the technology and finance sectors through senior roles at several high-profile companies. I served as the COO/CFO at Homebase.com from 2017 to 2020, where I was responsible for overseeing the company's financial operations and strategic initiatives. Prior to that, I held various finance leadership positions at RideShare Solutions from 2013 to 2017, including Head of Finance / Acting CFO. My career began at Pinnacle Bank, where I worked from 2007 to 2013, focusing on investment banking for the Technology, Media & Telecom Group.

My educational background includes an MBA from the Harvard Business School, which I obtained in 2007, and a Bachelor of Applied Science in Computer Engineering from the Technological University of Malaysia, completed in 2002. This combination of technical and business education has provided me with a solid foundation for evaluating and supporting innovative technology ventures.

Through my work at Zenith Ventures, I have had the opportunity to meet and collaborate with numerous talented entrepreneurs and technologists. It was in this context that I first became acquainted with Mr. Mehta and his groundbreaking work in the field of AI for clinical trials. From our initial interactions, it was clear that Mr. Mehta possesses a rare combination of technical expertise, visionary thinking, and entrepreneurial drive.

Mr. Mehta is the Co-Founder and CTO of Horizon AI, a company that is pioneering the use of AI to transform the way clinical trials are conducted. Horizon AI is developing an AI-powered platform that streamlines the process of recruiting and managing participants for clinical trials, ultimately making these trials more efficient and effective. As the CTO, Mr. Mehta is responsible for leading the development of the company's technology and ensuring that it meets the highest standards of quality and performance.

One of the most impressive aspects of Mr. Mehta's work is his ability to bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI research and practical, real-world applications in the life sciences industry. He has a deep understanding of both the technical and domain-specific challenges involved in applying AI to clinical trials, and he has demonstrated remarkable skill in developing innovative solutions that address these challenges.

Under Mr. Mehta's leadership, Horizon AI has made significant strides in advancing the state of the art in AI for clinical trials. The company's platform leverages advanced machine learning techniques to identify and engage potential trial participants more effectively, reducing the time and cost associated with participant recruitment. This has the potential to greatly accelerate the pace of medical research and bring new treatments to market more quickly, ultimately benefiting patients and healthcare providers alike.

Mr. Mehta's technical expertise is complemented by his strong leadership and team-building skills. He has built and mentored a talented engineering team at Horizon AI, fostering a culture of innovation and excellence. His ability to inspire and motivate his team has been a key factor in the company's success and rapid progress.

In addition to his work at Horizon AI, Mr. Mehta has made significant contributions to the broader AI and life sciences communities. He has published research papers on the application of AI in clinical trials and has presented his work at industry conferences. His insights and thought leadership have been invaluable in advancing the field and fostering collaboration among researchers and practitioners.

Mr. Mehta's achievements have not gone unnoticed. Horizon AI has garnered interest and support from leading venture capital firms, including Zenith Ventures, which has invested in the company and continues to support its growth. This backing is a testament to the confidence that investors have in Mr. Mehta's vision and leadership.

In conclusion, Mr. Rohan Mehta is an extraordinary individual whose expertise in AI for clinical trials is truly world-class. His technical skills, innovative thinking, and leadership abilities have enabled him to make significant contributions to the field and to the success of Horizon AI. I am confident that he will continue to drive groundbreaking advancements in the application of AI to life sciences, ultimately benefiting patients and healthcare providers worldwide.

I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Mehta for the O-1 visa, as his presence in the United States will allow him to continue his important work and further contribute to the advancement of AI and clinical research. Please do not hesitate to contact me if you require any additional information or clarification regarding my recommendation.

Sincerely,

Aditya Kapoor

Co-Founder and General PartnerZenith Ventures
final:
Dear Sir or Madam,

My name is Aditya Kapoor, and I am writing this letter to express my highest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Mehta. As an exceptional expert in the field of AI for clinical trials, Mr. Mehta has consistently showcased remarkable capabilities through his pioneering work at Horizon AI.

As the Co-Founder and General Partner at Zenith Equity Partners, a venture capital firm nestled in the heart of San Francisco, I have had the privilege of supporting innovative, early-stage technology ventures since 2020. Zenith Equity Partners is dedicated to guiding visionary entrepreneurs from the inception of their ideas to successful IPOs, leveraging our extensive industry knowledge and vast networks. My own career journey has traversed high-profile roles, from COO/CFO at Homebase.com to various finance leadership positions at RideShare Solutions, and investment banking at Pinnacle Bank. These experiences have equipped me with a robust foundation to evaluate and nurture groundbreaking technological innovations.

Amidst this vibrant ecosystem of talent at Zenith, I first encountered Mr. Mehta. It was immediately apparent that he embodies a rare blend of technical brilliance, visionary thinking, and passionate entrepreneurial spirit. As the Co-Founder and CTO of Horizon AI, Mr. Mehta is at the forefront of revolutionizing clinical trials through AI, streamlining participant recruitment and trial management into more efficient and effective processes. His leadership in developing cutting-edge technology to meet the highest standards of quality and performance has been truly impactful.

Mr. Mehta's ability to bridge the divide between advanced AI research and its practical applications in the life sciences underscores his unique insightfulness. He adeptly navigates both technical intricacies and domain-specific challenges to craft innovative solutions that address industry needs. Under his dynamic leadership, Horizon AI has significantly advanced AI capabilities in clinical trials, employing advanced machine learning to expedite medical research and deliver new treatments more swiftly, ultimately benefiting patients and healthcare providers on a global scale.

Beyond his technical acumen, Mr. Mehta's leadership and team-building prowess shine through. At Horizon AI, he has cultivated a talented engineering team, instilling a culture of excellence and innovation. His inspirational leadership has been pivotal to the rapid progress and success of the company.

His stellar achievements have naturally attracted interest and support from leading venture capital firms, including ours. With a total of $4.9 million in funding, Zenith Equity Partners proudly contributes $3,250,000 to Horizon AI. This substantial investment, alongside contributions from Acorn Capital, LifeVenture VC, Forward Capital, Bloom VC, and Nguyen Tran, is a testament to the collective confidence in Mr. Mehta's vision and leadership, underscoring the transformative potential of his work in the AI and clinical trials arena.

Beyond his achievements with Horizon AI, Mr. Mehta has also made significant contributions to the broader tech community. He serves as a judge at HackFest, the world's largest collegiate hackathon, hosted at Inland University. In this role, he evaluates innovative projects, offering his insights and expertise to budding technologists. This position not only underscores his commitment to fostering innovation but also highlights his influence in shaping the next generation of technological leaders.

Recognizing his deep understanding of technologies, specifically AI, we have invited him to contribute his technical expertise and insights when assessing potential investment opportunities for Zenith. His ability to evaluate the practical applications and potential of new AI technologies enhances our capacity to make strategic investment decisions, positioning us to effectively tap into promising trends within the tech industry.

In sum, Mr. Rohan Mehta is a remarkable innovator whose contributions to the field of AI for clinical trials have already had a profound impact. His ability to marry technical excellence with a visionary approach sets him apart as a leader in his field. With his deep commitment to advancing technology and fostering innovation, I am confident that he will continue to drive meaningful advancements across the healthcare landscape. It is without reservation that I offer my strongest endorsement for Mr. Mehta, as his work has the potential to yield significant benefits on a global scale.

Should you require any additional details or further clarification, feel free to reach out to me.

Respectfully Submitted,

Aditya Kapoor
Co-Founder and General Partner
Zenith Equity Partners
[contact email here]
